mapper.select: SELECT id, metric_code, metric_name, metric_type, entity_code, aggregation_type, expression, unit, precision_value, result_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric WHERE is_deleted = false

SELECT id, metric_code, metric_name, metric_type, entity_code, aggregation_type, expression, unit, precision_value, result_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric WHERE metric_code = #{metricCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, metric_code, metric_name, metric_type, entity_code, aggregation_type, expression, unit, precision_value, result_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_metric WHERE is_deleted = false AND metric_code IN #{code}
SELECT metric_code FROM agent.dsl_metric WHERE is_deleted = false AND embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY embedding <=> #{vector}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
